C 78

TOWNHOUSE RESTAURANT

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: March 24, 2026

Trend: improving · C (78/100) · safer than 17% of Seminole County restaurants we grade

Is TOWNHOUSE RESTAURANT a safe place to eat? Not quite — only a C, 78/100, the last time the state checked (March 24, 2026). That visit logged 2 high-priority and 6 basic violations.

Its latest visit (March 24, 2026) logged 2 high-priority and 6 basic violations. Diners rate it 4.5 across 3,316 reviews. By health score it's safer than 17% of Seminole County restaurants we grade. Menus here flag options for vegan, vegetarian, and organic diners.

Get directions Call (407) 365-5151

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. March 24, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    2 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 6 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition
    • 12 — Handwashing; employee eating/drinking/smoking practices
    • 13 — Clean clothes; hair restraints; jewelry; fingernails
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 16 — Dishwashing facilities; sanitizer test kits; gauges
    • 24 — Storage & handling of clean equipment and utensils; air drying
    • 35 — Insects/rodents/pests; outer openings protected against pests (×2)

  2. October 21, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    0 high-priority · 2 intermediate · 10 basic

    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained (×2)
    • 16 — Dishwashing facilities; sanitizer test kits; gauges (×2)
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 31 — Handwash sinks accessible; handwashing supplies & sign provided
    • 33 — Garbage and refuse; premises maintained (×2)
    • 35 — Insects/rodents/pests; outer openings protected against pests
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation
    • 51 — Other conditions of sanitary & safe operation
